title: RFC 7807 Problem Details Envelope
description: Standard error response envelope following RFC 7807 (Problem Details for HTTP APIs). Every error response from the API uses this shape. Clients MUST use the 'type' URI as the primary identifier for the problem; the 'title' is advisory only.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type. When dereferenced, it SHOULD provide human-readable documentation for the problem type. When not present, its value defaults to 'about:blank'.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. SHOULD NOT change from occurrence to occurrence of the problem, except for localization purposes.

status.description: The HTTP status code generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem. MUST match the actual HTTP response status code.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem. SHOULD focus on helping the client correct the problem, rather than giving debugging information. Consumers SHOULD NOT parse the 'detail' field — use extensions instead.
examples: The 'name' field must be between 1 and 255 characters.
Your current balance is 30, but that costs 50.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. May or may not yield further information if dereferenced. Useful for support and forensic purposes.

errors.description: Extension array containing detailed sub-errors. Used for validation failures, multi-field errors, or batch operation errors. Each entry describes a specific problem.

field.description: The JSON field path that caused the error. Uses dot-notation for nested fields.

reason.description: A machine-readable error code for the specific field error. Clients SHOULD NOT parse this for business logic but may use it for diagnostics.

message.description: A human-readable explanation for this field error.
examples: Must be a valid email address.

examples.title: Validation Error
examples.detail: One or more fields failed validation.

errors.message: Must be a valid email address.

examples.title: Unauthorized
examples.detail: Bearer token is missing, expired, or invalid.

examples.title: Not Found
examples.detail: Resource with ID 'abc-123-def' was not found.

examples.title: Rate Limit Exceeded
examples.detail: You have exceeded the rate limit of 1000 requests per hour. Retry after 1800 seconds.

examples.title: Internal Server Error
examples.detail: An unexpected error occurred. Please contact support and include the instance URI.
